text:
Market today: Tech/chip names are seeing positive momentum driven by strong AI demand and a general Asian tech rally, despite some global economic slowdown concerns.

Your holdings: SOXL (-30.59%) and SPAL (-36.78%) need immediate attention. Both are leveraged ETFs with significant losses, and your margin account amplifies these drops. All other holdings look fine today.

Watch: Keep an eye on continued AI chip demand indicators and any shifts in global macro sentiment, especially from China.

Bottom line: Prioritize risk management on your leveraged losers while staying alert for confirmed chip sector strength.
plays: SOXL: Consider trimming or exiting this leveraged ETF given the -30.59% loss and "SELL" status; margin amplifies this risk.
SPAL: Review your SPAL position; it's a new, leveraged ETF already down -36.78%, posing amplified risk on margin.
AMD: Consider a new buy on AMD (entry 547.58-547.03, stop 545.95), backed by strong AI chip demand news and its scanner setup.
